svg.text: MR. KAKUBA RODERIC — PROPOSED RESIDENTIAL HOUSE AT PLOT 9711, BLOCK 185, KYADONDO, KAMPALA DISTRICT
DETAILED SINGLE LINE DIAGRAM — ELECTRICAL SERVICES | M&E: ICON CONSULTANTS, KAMPALA | BS 7671:2018 / IEC 60364
Location: External Kitchen/Sauna Building — Plant Room (as confirmed on dwg page 4)
Incomer: 80A TP+N MCCB | SPD Class II fitted | Earth Leakage Relay 100mA | IP54 Enclosure
Main Earth Bar: 16mm² CPC → 2× Earth Rods (1.2m depth, 3m apart) | MET bonding rail | Zs < 0.8Ω
P2 GF Sockets USB Charging 20A RCBO 2.5mm²
Earth: 10mm² CPC to MDB | Supplementary bonding: 4mm² to bath/shower metalwork
Lighting control: DALI interface (Thorn Contus + Radiant B/C bulkheads)
Total installed load: ~42 kW | Max demand: ~55A after diversity
All sockets: switched 13A BS1363 | USB charging outlets: 2A Type A
DALI lighting bus: Thorn CONTUS 60W LED linear (4000K, L80 50kh, CRI80, IP44)
CCU: 45A DP main switch + 13A switched socket faceplate marked COOKER
Incomer: 50A DP MCB | IP44 | DIN rail
Located same room as MDB — confirmed drawing page 4
Overheat thermostat: 110°C | All cables heat-resist 90°C min
Sauna: IEC 60364-7-703 | All sauna cable: HELKAMA 3×4mm² RKUB heat-resist
Sauna: Zone 1 (above 1.0m from heater) — only heating appliances permitted
Earth: 6mm² CPC | Sauna metalwork bonded: 6mm² to MET rail
Total DB02 load: ~25 kW | Max demand: ~50A incl. sauna
CCU symbol confirmed on kitchen layout page 4 — 45A DP + 13A FCU
RCBO type A for VFD pumps
DALI bus shared with DB01 lighting
Site plan shows car park area
SECTION D — LUMINAIRE SCHEDULE (extracted from AutoCAD drawings, page 1–4)
SECTION E — SOCKET / SWITCH / SPECIALIST OUTLET SCHEDULE
13A SP 1-Gang switched socket outlet — rooms, all locations
13A 2-Gang + 2A USB charging outlet — master bed, bedrooms (USB-A)
20A DP Control Switch + neon + water heater — bathrooms (DP for WH)
45A DP main switch + 13A socket (CCU) — kitchen(s): marked COOKER
NOTE: All sockets to be flush mounted — metal or white moulded as per interior schedule
Bathrooms: shaver socket only within Zone 3 — 13A sockets min 3m from bath/shower
Water Heaters: 20A DP switch with neon indicator — one per bathroom/level
Main house 2-storey: minimum 3× water heater circuits (GF + FF Master + FF Beds)
External building: 1× water heater circuit (kitchen/bedroom 2 shared)
Borehole/Pump: 20A RCBO dedicated — submersible 0.75kW (site plan shows compound)
A/C Provisions: 20A RCBO per indoor unit — split system, location TBC by M&E
Recommend: Inverter type (COP >3.5) — trunking from DB to indoor unit position
Sauna Ventilation: dedicated circuit — interlock with heater (vent off during heat phase)
Pool Pump: timer-controlled — 8h/day filtration cycle (off-peak if tariff available)
Generator: Diesel, rated 7.5kVA — located external building plant area (page 4)
ATS confirmed on page 4: automatic changeover — seamless switchover on mains failure
Generator start: auto on voltage drop below 180V | Cooldown: 3min before shutdown
Fuel tank: integral 10L + external 200L reserve — weekly test run recommended
Cable containment: PVC conduit in walls/ceilings | Steel conduit in plant areas | SWA for underground
All conduit runs to be continuous with inspection boxes ≤ 750mm from bends | Min 20mm dia. in walls
SECTION F — LOAD SCHEDULE & DIVERSITY CALCULATION
Diversity per IEE On-Site Guide Table 1B: First 3kW @ 100%, remainder @ 40% for domestic
80A MCCB main board as per drawing legend — review with UMEME for supply capacity
Main Earth: 16mm² Cu CPC from MDB to 2× earth rods (1.2m, 3m apart)
Earth rods: Copper-bonded steel, 1.2m × 16mm, compound near MDB
Main bonding: 10mm² Cu — water service, gas (if any), structural steel
Supp. bonding: 4mm² Cu — all bath/shower room extraneous metalwork
Pool bonding: 4mm² Cu ring equipotential — ALL pool metalwork to MET
Sauna bonding: 6mm² Cu — metal frame, bench brackets, door frame to MET
Gate bonding: 6mm² Cu — gate motor frame, fence, pillars to earth
Generator: Separately earthed to dedicated earth rod + bonded to MDB earth bar
Testing: Zs < 1.0Ω at all points | Rcd: test every 6 months | Insulation: >1MΩ
Inspection: Full installation test + EICR on completion before supply connection
ENA (UMEME) approval required for connection — submit as-built drawings for approval
PME not used at pool / sauna zones — local TT earthing for these areas
① Drawings prepared by ICON CONSULTANTS, P.O. Box 6134, Kampala — Tel: 041-4540630
② Standards: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 (18th Ed.) | IEC 60364 | Uganda Electricity Act Cap 145
③ 3 buildings: Main House (2-storey, octagonal) | External (Kitchen/Sauna/Billiard) | Pool/Gate
④ MDB + Generator ATS located in external building plant room — confirmed drawing page 4
⑤ DB01 in main house | DB02 in external building (local) — both fed from MDB via SWA
⑥ All RCBO Type B for motor/inductive loads (sauna, pool pump, gate) — Type A for general
⑦ Sauna: IEC 60364-7-703 | Pool: IEC 60364-7-702 | Gate: BS EN 12453 | External: IP44 min
⑧ All cable sizes to be verified by voltage drop calc. for actual cable routes when confirmed
⑨ DALI lighting bus: Thorn CONTUS + Radiant B/C bulkheads — wired per DALI protocol (IEC 62386)
⑩ This schematic supersedes previous Rev 00 — no solar/battery provision in this design
⑪ Generator confirmed (page 4) — diesel auto-start. Solar/battery NOT in this project.
⑫ As-built drawings to be issued after practical completion + full test & inspection certificate
⑬ Site: Plot 9711, Block 185, Kyadondo, Kampala | Client: Mr. Kakuba Roderic
